best_individual: sub(neg(mul(0.021, step_penalty_multiplier(distance, 0.954, 0.374))), protected_pow(protected_div(0.26, 0.926), if_then_else(is_water, steepness, steepness)))

hall_of_fame.individual: sub(neg(mul(0.021, step_penalty_multiplier(distance, 0.954, 0.374))), protected_pow(protected_div(0.26, 0.926), if_then_else(is_water, steepness, steepness)))
add(sub(if_then_else(is_water, 0.242, steepness), neg(mul(if_then_else(is_water, 0.792, 0.201), mul(steepness, distance)))), neg(step_penalty_multiplier(distance, 0.954, 0.374)))
